descriptions.aeoDefinition: SQLite Viewer is a free online tool for opening and exploring SQLite database files in your browser. Run SQL queries with autocomplete, browse tables, and export to CSV or JSON. No data leaves your device.
descriptions.whatIsP1: The SQLite Viewer lets you open and explore SQLite database files directly in your browser — no server upload required. Run SQL queries, browse tables, and export data to [CSV](/csv) or [JSON](/json). Powered by sql.js (WebAssembly).
descriptions.whatIsP2: Powered by sql.js (SQLite compiled to WebAssembly), it supports autocomplete, query history, pagination, and handles databases up to browser memory limits.
descriptions.faq1A: The tool supports SQLite database files (.db, .sqlite, .sqlite3). Open any SQLite file to browse tables, run queries, and export data.
descriptions.faq2Q: Is my database uploaded to a server?
descriptions.faq2A: No. The database is loaded into browser memory using sql.js (SQLite compiled to WebAssembly). All operations happen locally.
descriptions.faq3A: Full SQLite SQL syntax including SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, JOINs, subqueries, aggregations, and transactions. The editor provides autocomplete for table and column names.
